name: Nakuru City Integrated Drainage Plan
notes: City charter granted 2021. Drainage plan commissioned 2022 but not yet adopted. Rapid population growth outpacing planning.

name: Rhonda-Kaptembwo Stormwater Upgrade
notes: Design complete 2020. First procurement failed. Retendered 2023. Award pending.

name: Lake Nakuru Riparian Buffer Enforcement
blocking_factor: Tourism and settlement interests conflicting with buffer enforcement
notes: 30m buffer mapped. Encroachment documented annually. KWS-NEMA jurisdiction overlap creates enforcement paralysis.

name: Nakuru-Naivasha Drainage Corridor Study
notes: Hydrological study completed 2022. Identifies 4 critical drainage pinch points. Recommendations not yet actioned.

name: Early Warning Integration with KMD
notes: KMD radar coverage adequate for 6-hour warning. Alert transmission to sub-county emergency teams inconsistent. No community-level alert system.
